clipboardHistory.value:
pages:
  - name: Home
    # Optionally, if you only have a single page you can hide the desktop navigation for a cleaner look
    # hide-desktop-navigation: true
    columns:
      - size: small
        widgets:
          - type: calendar
            first-day-of-week: monday

          - type: rss
            limit: 10
            collapse-after: 3
            cache: 12h
            feeds:
              - url: https://selfh.st/rss/
                title: selfh.st
                limit: 4
              - url: https://ciechanow.ski/atom.xml
              - url: https://www.joshwcomeau.com/rss.xml
                title: Josh Comeau
              - url: https://samwho.dev/rss.xml
              - url: https://ishadeed.com/feed.xml
                title: Ahmad Shadeed

          - type: twitch-channels
            channels:
              - theprimeagen
              - j_blow
              - piratesoftware
              - cohhcarnage
              - christitustech
              - EJ_SA

      - size: full
        widgets:
          - type: group
            widgets:
              - type: hacker-news
              - type: lobsters

          - type: videos
            channels:
              - UCXuqSBlHAE6Xw-yeJA0Tunw # Linus Tech Tips
              - UCR-DXc1voovS8nhAvccRZhg # Jeff Geerling
              - UCsBjURrPoezykLs9EqgamOA # Fireship
              - UCBJycsmduvYEL83R_U4JriQ # Marques Brownlee
              - UCHnyfMqiRRG1u-2MsSQLbXA # Veritasium

          - type: group
            widgets:
              - type: reddit
                subreddit: technology
                show-thumbnails: true
              - type: reddit
                subreddit: selfhosted
                show-thumbnails: true

      - size: small
        widgets:
          - type: weather
            location: London, United Kingdom
            units: metric # alternatively "imperial"
            hour-format: 12h # alternatively "24h"
            # Optionally hide the location from being displayed in the widget
            # hide-location: true

          - type: markets
            markets:
              - symbol: SPY
                name: S&P 500
              - symbol: BTC-USD
                name: Bitcoin
              - symbol: NVDA
                name: NVIDIA
              - symbol: AAPL
                name: Apple
              - symbol: MSFT
                name: Microsoft

          - type: releases
            cache: 1d
            # Without authentication the Github API allows for up to 60 requests per hour. You can create a
            # read-only token from your Github account settings and use it here to increase the limit.
            # token: ...
            repositories:
              - glanceapp/glance
              - go-gitea/gitea
              - immich-app/immich
              - syncthing/syncthing

  # Add more pages here:
  # - name: Your page name
  #   columns:
  #     - size: small
  #       widgets:
  #         # Add widgets here

  #     - size: full
  #       widgets:
  #         # Add widgets here

  #     - size: small
  #       widgets:
  #         # Add widgets here

container_name: jellyseerr
    environment:
      - LOG_LEVEL=debug
      - TZ=Asia/Tashkent
      - PORT=5055 #optional

jellyseerr:
    image: fallenbagel/jellyseerr:latest
    container_name: jellyseerr
    environment:
      - LOG_LEVEL=debug
      - TZ=Asia/Tashkent
      - PORT=5055 #optional
    ports:
      - 5055:5055
    volumes:
      - /path/to/appdata/config:/app/config
    healthcheck:
      test: wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:5055/api/v1/status || exit 1
      start_period: 20s
      timeout: 3s
      interval: 15s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped

filebrowser exited with code 1

services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin
    container_name: jellyfin
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/cache:/cache
      - /home/khalyl/Videos/Anime:/media
    expose:
      - "8096"
  nginx-proxy-manager:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    container_name: nginx-proxy-manager
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 80:80
      - 81:81
      - 443:443
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/nginx/data:/data
      - /home/khalyl/docker/nginx/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
    depends_on:
      - adguardhome
  adguardhome:
    image: adguard/adguardhome
    container_name: adguardhome
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    ports:
      - 53:53/tcp
      - 53:53/udp
      - 3000:3000/tcp # Web admin port
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/adguardhome/work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - /home/khalyl/docker/adguardhome/conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
    expose:
      - "3000"
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser
    container_name: filebrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    user: 0:0
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/filebrowser/data:/srv
      - /home/khalyl/docker/filebrowser/database:/database
      - /home/khalyl/docker/filebrowser/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl:/srv/home
    expose:
      - "8081"
  sonarr:
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/sonarr
    container_name: sonarr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/sonarr/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl/docker/sonarr/data:/data
      - /home/khalyl/Downloads/torrent:/data/torrent
      - /home/khalyl/Videos/Anime:/data/anime
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
    expose:
      - "8989"
  prowlarr:
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/prowlarr
    container_name: prowlarr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/prowlarr/config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
    expose:
      - "9696"
  qbittorrent:
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/qbittorrent
    container_name: qbittorrent
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy_network
    ports:
      - 6881:6881 # torrent port
      - 6881:6881/udp
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
      - WEBUI_PORTS=8080/tcp
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/qbittorrent/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl/docker/qbittorrent/data:/data
      - /home/khalyl/Downloads/torrent:/data/torrent
    expose:
      - "8080"
networks:
  proxy_network:
    name: proxy_network
x-dockge:
  urls: []

services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin
    container_name: jellyfin
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/cache:/cache
      - type: bind
        source: /home/khalyl/Videos/Anime
        target: /media
    ports:
      - 8096:80
      - 8920:443
  nginx-proxy-manager:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    ports:
      - 80:80
      - 81:81
      - 443:443
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/nginx/data:/data
      - ~/docker/nginx/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
  adguardhome:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: adguard/adguardhome
    ports:
      - 53:53
      - 3000:3000
      - 8082:80
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/adguardhome/work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - ~/docker/adguardhome/conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
  filebrowser:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser
    user: 0:0
    ports:
      - 8081:80
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/filebrowser/data:/srv
      - ~/docker/filebrowser/database:/database
      - ~/docker/filebrowser/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl:/srv/home
  sonarr:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/sonarr
    network_mode: host
    user: 0:0
    ports:
      - 8989:80
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/sonarr/config:/config
      - ~/docker/sonarr/data:/data
      - ~/Downloads/torrent:/data/torrent
      - ~/Videos/Anime:/data/anime
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
  prowlarr:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/prowlarr
    network_mode: host
    user: 0:0
    ports:
      - 9696:80
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/prowlarr/config:/config
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
  qbittorrent:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: ghcr.io/hotio/qbittorrent
    network_mode: host
    ports:
      - 8080:80
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
      - WEBUI_PORTS=8080/tcp,8080/udp
      - LIBTORRENT=v1
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/qbittorrent/config:/config
      - ~/docker/qbittorrent/data:/data
      - ~/Downloads/torrent:/data/torrent
networks: {}
x-dockge:
  urls: []

default-network:
    image: alpine
    command: sleep infinity
    networks:
      main_network:
        aliases:
          - local.live

networks:
  main_network:
    driver: bridge
    name: main_network

jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin
    container_name: jellyfin
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/config:/config
      - /home/khalyl/docker/jellyfin/cache:/cache
      - type: bind
        source: /home/khalyl/Videos/Anime
        target: /media
    ports:
      - 8096:80
      - 8920:443
  nginx-proxy-manager:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    ports:
      - 80:80
      - 81:81
      - 443:443
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/nginx/data:/data
      - ~/docker/nginx/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
  adguardhome:
    restart: unless-stopped
    image: adguard/adguardhome
    ports:
      - 53:53
      - 3000:3000
      - 8082:80
    volumes:
      - ~/docker/adguardhome/work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - ~/docker/adguardhome/conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf

environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - UMASK=002
      - TZ=Etc/UTC
      - WEBUI_PORTS=8080/tcp,8080/udp
      - LIBTORRENT=v1

jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin
    container_name: jellyfin
    user: uid:gid
    network_mode: 'host'
    volumes:
      - /path/to/config:/config
      - /path/to/cache:/cache
      - type: bind
        source: /path/to/media
        target: /media
      - type: bind
        source: /path/to/media2
        target: /media2
        read_only: true
      # Optional - extra fonts to be used during transcoding with subtitle burn-in
      - type: bind
        source: /path/to/fonts
        target: /usr/local/share/fonts/custom
        read_only: true
    restart: 'unless-stopped'
